title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Are you a talented Senior AI Engineer/Architect looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than Lemon.io — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.

What we offer:

  • The rate depends on your skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.
  • No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.
  • We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.
  • Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.
  • We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.
  • Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?
  • We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.
  • Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.
  • Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 75 countries.

We have several AI-related roles; here are some of them.

Requirements - AI Engineer:

  • 3+ years of commercial experience applying AI to practical technology solutions
  • A solid understanding of Python is a must; experience with other programming languages commonly used in AI is a plus
  • Experience with Vector Databases, Pinecone or Weaviate is required
  • 2+ years of experience with LangChain is mandatory
  • 2+ years of experience with large language models (LLMs) or vLLMs is mandatory
  • 2+ years of experience with RAG or OpenAI is required

Requirements - AI Agent Architect:

  • 3+ years of experience with Python
  • 3+ years of experience with LLM
  • Experience with Multi-agent systems architecture, AI agent orchestration, AI telemetry is a must.

Requirements - AI Automation Architect:

  • 1+ year of experience with Workflow Automation and Webhooks
  • 3+ years with SQL is a must
  • Familiarity with AI API integration and Claude Cowork is a must
  • Knowledge of Make.com/n8n/Zapier

Other requirements:

  • Strong technical skills: as a Senior AI Engineer/Architect, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.
  • Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.
  • Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.
  • Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.
  • Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.

Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the Lemon.io community!

NOT YOUR TECH STACK?

We have a variety of projects, so if you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in Site Reliability Engineering, Platform Engineering, React & Python, React & Golang, Golang, React & Java, React & Ruby, Ruby, PHP & Vue, Vue & Node.js, React & .NET, Android & iOS, iOS & Swift, Flutter & Dart, Blockchain (Ethereum/Ethers.js/Wagmi/Viem/Solana), Angular & Node.js, Vue & .NET, Python & Vue, DevOps, MLOps, Data Science, Angular & PHP, Angular & .NET, Symfony & React, Symfony & Vue, Symfony & Angular, Python, Symfony & JavaScript & Next.js & TypeScript, Data Analysis, React & PHP, Data Engineering, Project Management, Product Management, QA Automation, QA Manual, Embedded Software Engineering, React Native & Node, React Native & React, React Native & Ruby, React Native & Python, WordPress, Android, Data Annotation, Angular, Python & Node, React & Node.js, Java & Spring, Svelte & Python, Svelte & Node.js, Svelte & TypeScript, Rust, Shopify & JavaScript, Vue & Nuxt, PHP & Laravel, UI/UX Design, Animation, Graphic Design, React & Node & React Native, .NET & C#, Electron, Scala, C++, Unreal Engine & C++, Python & LLM, Unity, or Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to connect with you and match you with a project that fits your experience.

We work with developers from 75+ countries across Europe, Latin America, North America (the U.S. and Canada), selected countries in Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and Israel), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, and Papua New Guinea), and Africa (including Morocco and South Africa).

title: Full-Time Remote Tutoring Position
description:
Make a real impact on students’ academic journeys - from anywhere in the world. Join Revolution Prep as a full-time tutor and benefit from the stability and perks of being a full-time W-2 employee, not a contractor. We provide a dynamic in-house curriculum with a wealth of resources, so you can focus on teaching without the hassle of creating lesson plans or hunting down materials. Best of all, we offer paid training, prep time, and a supportive tutor community to help you do what you do best: help students. It’s meaningful work that offers both personal fulfillment and reliable income.

About the Role & Compensation:

  • Lead dynamic tutoring sessions, including executive function coaching (90%)
  • Discuss educational progress with students and families (5%)
  • Utilize our curated resources for stress-free planning (5%)
  • Full-time: 30-hours minimum commitment with 38 hours availability, including evenings and weekends
  • Pay: starts at $25/hour for tutoring with the opportunity to earn up to $29/hour based on performance and subject coverage at the 90-day review; prep and training time compensated at $10 per hour or your local minimum wage (whichever is higher)

Qualifications & Requirements:

  • Completed bachelor's degree mandatory; additional qualifications a plus
  • Authorization to work in the U.S. and current residence required
  • Minimum of one year teaching or tutoring experience; expertise in AP STEM subjects a plus
  • Ability to comfortably tutor math content through Algebra II
  • Reliable high-speed internet and quiet, professional space; technology kit provided if needed (webcam, headset, ring light, green screen, annotation tablet)
  • The ability to commit to the same 38 hours of availability week-on-week during weekday afternoons/evenings and at least 8 hours of weekends.
  • Commit to a minimum of one year of employment

Why Join Us:

  • Paid prep time and subject-specific materials provided
  • Paid onboarding and training + ongoing professional development
  • We provide health insurance, 401K options, and bonus opportunities
  • No competing for hours, hours are based on availability and subject expertise
  • Engaging community and supportive Faculty Leaders for tutor guidance
  • Opportunity to focus on holistic development of students, including life skills

Schedule Requirements

Availability: Post at least 38 prime-time hours weekly, the same hours every week. Our goal is to book you for 30 tutoring hours per week depending on student demand. If you are interested in up to 35 hours, that is possible, and will depend on availability, subject coverage, and student demand.

Prime-time Hours when availability should be posted:

  • Mon-Thu: 3-11 pm ET
  • Fri: 3-7 pm ET
  • Sat: 9 am - 7 pm ET
  • Sun: 9 am - 10 pm ET
  • Weekends: At least 8 hours of availability on either Saturday or Sunday is required.

Advance Planning: Preference will go to those who can post schedules 9+ months ahead and those who can commit to consistent hours week on week. Please submit time-off requests 4 weeks in advance.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/revolution_prep?igshid=MzRlODBiNWFlZA%3D%3D

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/revolution-prep/

title: Data Analyst (No Experience Required)
description:
For thousands of years, maps have provided humans with the knowledge they need to make decisions. As a Maps Evaluator, you will have the opportunity to provide ground truth for your town, city or country.

 

At Peroptyx, we are looking for Data Analysts who will review mapping data for digital mapping applications. Your research capabilities will validate and ensure that the navigation of certain routes are accurate and safe.

 

As part of this role you will verify that business names and opening hours are correct. You will check that the distance from a starting point to an end destination is listed accurately, resulting in better user experiences.

 

With this job you can plan your days around this highly flexible working schedule, work weekends or late evenings, all from the comfort of your own office. The flexibility of our roles minimizes the impact on your daily routine.

 

So, whether you are a student looking to earn as you learn, a retiree looking for a new challenge, a part-time/full time professional or a work from home parent, Peroptyx has the right role for you!

 

Benefits

  • Work up to 20 hours per week.

  • Earn a competitive rate of pay.

  • Develop your research skills.

  • Avoid the long commute.

  • Work from the comfort of your home office.

  • Enjoy the flexibility of setting your own working hours!

 

Ideal Candidate

  • Fluent in English and Swedish.

  • Excellent research skills.

  • Excellent local knowledge of your home country.

  • Good understanding and general knowledge of the geography and culture of Sweden.

  • Analytical mindset.

 

Job Requirements

  • Must be living in Sweden for a minimum of 5 consecutive years.

  • Must pass an online open-book exam that can verify your full understanding of the material and concepts.

  • Must be willing to work a minimum of 10 hours and up to 20 hours per week depending on task availability.

  • Good working knowledge of search engines, map applications and familiarity with social media platforms.

  • Strong ability to learn, understand and apply multiple sets of different instructions.

  • All work must be of an independent nature.

 

Apply Online Today!

title: Regional Sales Manager, SIU/K12 - Texas and Oklahoma Territory
description:
About Aver Information  

AVer Information Inc. is a global provider of cutting-edge audiovisual and technology solutions that empower innovation in education, enterprise, and government sectors. Our mission is to enhance communication, collaboration, and learning through high-quality, user-friendly technology that meets the needs of today's modern environments. 

Position Overview 

We are seeking a driven and experienced Regional Sales Manager to lead sales efforts in the Strategic Industry Units (SIU), and K-12 education markets in the Central location. This role focuses on expanding AVer’s market presence by cultivating strong relationships with channel partners, resellers, and end-users across targeted verticals. You will be responsible for developing and executing sales strategies to grow revenue, drive market share, and position AVer as a trusted technology provider. 

Job Responsibilities 

  • Develop and implement strategic sales plans targeting SIU and K-12 education customers. 
  • Identify and engage with key stakeholders, including IT decision-makers, technology coordinators, purchasing agents, and AV integrators. 
  • Foster strong channel partnerships through regular engagement, joint business  
  • planning, and co-selling strategies. 
  • Conduct product presentations and demonstrations tailored to specific use cases and customer needs. 
  • Work cross-functionally with internal teams (product, marketing, and technical support) to ensure solution alignment and customer success. 
  • Stay informed on industry trends, competitive landscapes, and product updates to provide market insights and strategic feedback. 
  • Deliver accurate sales forecasts, pipeline reports, and strategic updates to leadership. 
  • Represent AVer at trade shows, regional conferences, partner events, and customer engagements. 
  • Negotiate and close deals that meet or exceed revenue targets and customer satisfaction expectations. 

Qualifications 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or related field. 
  • 3/4+ years of proven sales experience in technology, preferably with experience in the education and/or public sector. 
  •  Knowledge of AV solutions, video collaboration technology, and classroom or campus technology environments. 
  • Established relationships with key players in the K-12 verticals is highly desirable. 
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills. 
  • Strong organizational and time-management abilities with a results-driven mindset. 
  • Proficiency in CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce), Microsoft Office, and collaboration tools. 
  • Willingness to travel as needed. 

Location: Remote, must be located in central region

Total Compensation: $90,000 base + $60,000 commission cap

AVer Information is an equal opportunity employer and we do not discriminate based on  

gender, race, color, religion, age, mental or physical disability, medical condition, genetic  

information, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity and expression (LGBTQIA), national  

origin, marital or domestic partner status, veteran status, or any other characteristic  

protected under federal or state laws or local ordinances or regulations

title: Email + SMS Marketing Strategist
description:
Must have email marketing experience in consumer products with a proven track record and be a native English speaker.

Remote · Reports to Founder/CEO + Marketing Lead

About Bebonia

Bebonia is the #1-rated curly hair extensions brand — voted best by InStyle, Byrdie, Allure, Glamour, Brides, and NaturallyCurly. Founded in 2017 by Soleil, a Dominican woman who built the product she couldn’t find, Bebonia has served 75,000+ customers and is run by a small, close-knit team of curly-haired women.

We believe curly hair should be enhanced, not erased. Every product we make, every email we send, and every campaign we create is grounded in that belief.
 

The Role

We’re looking for a strategic, creative, and detail-oriented Email + SMS Marketing Strategist to lead Bebonia’s owned marketing program across campaigns, flows, segmentation, testing, and optimization.

This role is more than writing and sending emails. We’re looking for someone who can think like a marketer, understand our customer journey, identify revenue opportunities, and translate insights into campaigns that feel personal, premium, and deeply curl-literate.

You’ll work closely with our marketing lead and marketing team to shape the email + SMS calendar, strengthen lifecycle flows, improve customer retention, and ensure every touchpoint reflects the Bebonia brand. You should be equally comfortable zooming out to build strategy and zooming in to write, design, test, and execute.
 

What You’ll Do

Email + SMS Strategy

Own Bebonia’s email + SMS strategy across campaigns, flows, segmentation, and testing

Build and manage the email calendar with a balance of brand storytelling, education, product discovery, launches, promotions, and retention moments

Identify opportunities to improve customer engagement, repeat purchase, conversion, and lifetime value

Use performance data, customer behavior, and business priorities to recommend what we send, who we send it to, and why

Develop thoughtful audience segments based on lifecycle stage, purchase behavior, curl needs, product interest, and engagement

Partner with the marketing lead and extended marketing team to turn product priorities,

brand moments, and customer insights into strategic campaign concepts
 

Lifecycle + Retention Marketing

Maintain, optimize, and expand Bebonia’s core Klaviyo flows, including welcome, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, win-back, VIP, and replenishment-style journeys

Audit flow performance regularly and recommend improvements to copy, creative, timing, segmentation, and offers

Create customer journeys that educate, build trust, reduce purchase hesitation, and encourage repeat purchases

Help strengthen retention strategy by identifying opportunities for cross-sell, upsell, review generation, loyalty, and post-purchase education.
 

Campaign Execution

Plan, write, design, and deploy email + SMS campaigns in Klaviyo

Write copy that matches the Bebonia voice — warm, expert, curl-literate, personal, and never corporate

Design polished, on-brand emails that feel premium, clear, and conversion-minded

Translate campaign strategy into strong subject lines, preview text, headlines, content blocks, CTAs, and visual direction

Collaborate with the social and marketing team on campaign rollouts, seasonal moments, product pushes, and launches

Maintain brand consistency across every email, SMS, and supporting visual touchpoint
 

Testing, Reporting + Optimization

A/B test subject lines, content angles, offers, send timing, CTAs, design layouts, and segmentation strategies

Monitor email + SMS performance, including revenue, conversion rate, click rate, open rate, deliverability, list growth, unsubscribe rate, and flow performance

Bring clear, data-backed insights to the team with recommendations for what to keep, change, or test next

Track list health and deliverability to ensure Bebonia’s owned channels remain strong and sustainable

Connect performance reporting back to broader business goals, not just email metrics

Creative + Paid Support

Design email templates and campaign graphics as needed

Create stills, GIFs, and supporting graphics for paid campaigns

Support the marketing team with campaign creative that can extend across email, SMS, paid, and social

Ensure creative assets reflect Bebonia’s premium, curl-literate positioning
 

What We’re Looking For

4+ years of email, SMS, lifecycle, or retention marketing experience, ideally with a DTC, beauty, haircare, or wellness brand

Strong strategic marketing instincts and the ability to connect customer behavior to campaign opportunities

Fluent in Klaviyo, including campaigns, flows, segmentation, A/B testing, reporting, and basic revenue attribution

Strong copywriting skills with the ability to write in a warm, elevated, customer-first brand voice

Design ability in Canva, Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar tools

Ability to create simple GIFs and campaign graphics

A strong understanding of customer journeys, retention marketing, and lifecycle strategy

Comfortable interpreting email and revenue data and turning it into actionable recommendations

High attention to detail across copy, design, QA, links, segmentation, and deployment

Ability to work independently, move quickly, communicate proactively, and manage projects from strategy through execution

Experience with Shopify and DTC ecommerce platforms

Background in paid creative, including Meta or Google ad stills and GIFs, is a plus

Genuine interest in curly hair, beauty, or wellness is a bonus — but curiosity is required
 

The Right Fit

You’re a marketer first, not just an email executor. You care about how an email looks and sounds, but you also care about what role it plays in the customer journey. You can look at a calendar and spot what’s missing. You can look at a flow and see where customers are dropping off. You can turn a product benefit into a strong campaign angle. And you understand that great email marketing is equal parts strategy, storytelling, design, testing, and thoughtful execution.

At Bebonia, email and SMS are not afterthoughts. They’re core brand channels — and we’re looking for someone who can help make them smarter, stronger, and more effective.

title: Content Creator (100% remote)
description:
Make videos about brands you love (eg: HelloFresh) and get paid (no followers required!)

Hello! We’re looking for everyday people with something to say to join our platform!👋

Sign up (it's free) and create videos about the brands you love across beauty, food & drink, lifestyle, fitness, and travel.

Brands actively using Marker to buy authentic videos include: HelloFresh, Dove, Vaseline, and L'Oreal!

Create videos in your own tone of voice and style; there are no briefs or brand interventions here. Authenticity and videos filled with your unique perspective are what brands need and want.

Videos can be reviews, tutorials, first impressions, unboxing vlogs, etc. Just keep them to 30 seconds or less! 

Once your video has been uploaded and approved on Marker, the brand featured can buy and use it for their marketing. You’ll earn up to $100 for each video you sell on our platform, and you can submit videos as often as you like (the more you upload, the more you can earn). 

To sign up, ensure you are: 

  • Based only in the USA or Canada (although you submit videos remotely, we are only Stripe-enabled in these territories, so if you sign up from elsewhere, we will NOT be able to verify or pay you).

  • Comfortable in front of the camera

  • Fluent in spoken & written English

  • A strong, confident storyteller 

  • Competent in recording, editing and uploading social media videos

  • Seriously interested in TikTok & Instagram

  • Passionate about brands and products, and the content on their social channels 

 

Note that this is not a full-time role. Upload videos as and when you choose, and you’ll be paid for each piece of content that you sell on Marker.

Please register via the provided link ONLY; note that any applicants who email us to apply will not be registered on our system.

We can’t wait to hear from you! 
Team Marker

title: Senior BI Developer (Tableau)
description:
About us:

 

Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with the opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. 🙂

Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives.

Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success.

 

The Role:

 

We are looking for a data-driven Senior BI Developer with a mastery of Tableau to design, build, and maintain our enterprise-level business intelligence infrastructure. In this role, you won't just build dashboards—you will act as the bridge between raw data and executive strategy.

 

You will lead the development of highly optimized, scalable visual analytics, establish data modeling best practices, and mentor junior developers. You are a perfect candidate if you are passionate about transforming complex datasets into intuitive data stories that drive massive business decisions.

 

What we’re looking for:

 

  • 5+ years of experience working as a BI Developer or Data Analyst, with at least 3+ years dedicated exclusively to advanced Tableau development.
  • Deep experience writing, optimizing, and debugging complex queries, joins, and stored procedures.
  • Proven experience working with modern cloud data warehouses (e.g., Snowflake, Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift) and understanding dimensional modeling (Star/Snowflake schemas).
  • Strong ability to synthesize complex quantitative analysis into clear, actionable visual insights for executive leadership.
  • Exceptional verbal and written communication skills; comfortable presenting data findings to technical and non-technical audiences alike.
  • Ability to manage multiple data projects simultaneously in an Agile/Scrum environment.
  • Located in CET timezone (+/- 3 hours), we are unable to consider applications from candidates in other time zones.

 

Nice-to-have skills:

 

  • Tableau Desktop Certified Professional or Data Analyst certification.
  • Experience with Python or R for advanced data manipulation, or hands-on experience with dbt (data build tool).
  • Experience embedding Tableau dashboards into web applications using the Tableau Embedding API.

 

Responsibilities:

 

  • Architect high-performance, interactive, and visually compelling Tableau dashboards and stories that meet complex business requirements.
  • Apply UI/UX best practices to dashboard design, ensuring reports are intuitive, actionable, and adoptable by non-technical stakeholders.
  • Master complex Tableau features, including Level of Detail (LOD) expressions, advanced parameter actions, sets, and table calculations.
  • Design, build, and optimize robust data structures, extracts, and data prep workflows (using Tableau Prep, SQL, or Alteryx) tailored for performance.
  • Write and optimize complex SQL queries to extract data from various enterprise data warehouses (e.g., Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift).
  • Collaborate with IT/DevOps to manage Tableau Server content governance, row-level security (RLS), extract refresh schedules, and user permissions.
  • Partner with product managers, business analysts, and executives to define Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and map out data requirements.
  • Establish development standards, design templates, and peer-review processes for the BI team. Mentor junior and mid-level developers.
  • Actively monitor dashboard performance and troubleshoot slow-loading workbooks to ensure an optimal user experience.

 

 

What we offer:

 

Get paid, not played

No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options.

 

Predictable project hours

Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients.

 

Flex days, so you can recharge

Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify.

 

Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies

Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies

.

Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions.

 

One seamless process, multiple opportunities

A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments.

 

Compensation

title: Client Success Manager (US small & medium businesses)
description:
Position: Client Success Manager

Location: 100% Remote – Work from Anywhere
Schedule: U.S. West Coast Hours, Monday–Friday (Full-Time)
 

Overview

Integrated Hire (integratedhire.com) helps small and mid-sized U.S. businesses build high-performing remote teams by connecting them with experienced offshore professionals across administration, finance, customer service, marketing, operations, and more.

We’re looking for a Client Success Manager who is highly organized, responsive, and excellent at keeping clients happy. This is not primarily a sales role. The focus is on onboarding, client communication, follow-up, problem solving, and making sure the client experience stays smooth from the moment a client signs through the hiring process and beyond.

You’ll work closely with our founders, sales, and recruitment team to keep clients properly onboarded, updated, and supported. You’ll help answer questions, coordinate next steps, monitor interviews, and resolve issues quickly before they become larger problems.

This role is best suited for someone who is calm under pressure, strong with follow-through, comfortable speaking with U.S.-based clients, and able to manage many moving pieces without letting anything fall through the cracks. Special preference will be given to Americans working from abroad, or candidates who have lived and worked in the U.S. long enough to communicate naturally with U.S. business owners and understand their expectations.

 

Key Responsibilities

Client Onboarding & Handover

  • Lead or join onboarding calls after a new client signs, and manage a smooth handover from sales to delivery

  • Confirm and document client requirements, expectations, and timelines for the internal team

  • Set the tone for a professional, organized client experience from day one
     

Client Communication & Retention

  • Serve as the main point of contact for clients through recruitment, placement, and beyond

  • Run regular check-ins and mid-cycle updates on search progress, organize interviews, and next steps

  • Answer client questions with clear guidance on process, documentation, and timelines

  • Stay proactive after hires are made — flag concerns, expansion opportunities, and risks to the right internal personnel

  • Keep clients seeing Integrated Hire as a reliable long-term partner
     

Problem Resolution & Support

  • Spot client concerns early and resolve them quickly, coordinating with recruiters and leadership as needed

  • Handle requests around documentation, contracts, and process changes

  • Escalate sensitive issues while keeping ownership of the follow-through
     

Interview & Recruitment Coordination

  • Coordinate interview scheduling between clients, candidates, and recruiters

  • Monitor client interviews to ensure attendance

  • Jump in on scheduling, access, or technical issues in real time so recruiters stay focused

  • Collect post-interview feedback and share it clearly with the team

 

What We’re Looking For

Required

  • 3+ years in client success, account management, operations, recruitment coordination, or a similar client-facing role

  • Experience working with U.S.-based clients or companies

  • Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

  • Strong organization and follow-through across multiple clients, tasks, and conversations

  • Comfortable leading client calls and handling client questions professionally

  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to stay calm when issues come up

  • High attention to detail with documentation, scheduling, and process management

  • Proactive, dependable, and able to take ownership without needing constant reminders

  • Comfortable working U.S. daytime hours

 

Preferred

  • Experience in staffing, recruitment, outsourcing, BPO, or remote team management

  • Experience supporting SMB clients in the U.S.

  • Familiarity with CRM, ATS, project management, or client communication tools

  • Experience coordinating interviews, onboarding, or service delivery processes

  • Background in operations, executive support, or customer success

 

Why Join Us

  • Fully remote – work from anywhere

  • Competitive monthly compensation

  • Work directly with founders and senior team members

  • Play a key role in improving client experience and retention

  • Fast-growing company with strong opportunity for advancement

  • Collaborative, entrepreneurial team environment
location: Anywhere in the world (US business hours)
